name: CLOVER HEALTH INVESTMENTS, CORP. /DE
summary: Part I . General At Clover Health, our vision is to empower every physician with technology to identify, manage, and treat chronic diseases earlier. This results in earlier diagnosis and treatment, earlier disease management and more affordable and accessible care. Our strategy is to improve the care of our Medicare Advantage ("MA") members, develop wide physician networks, and provide technology to help empower physicians.
